Off Calendar Nov-04-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER RUFUS IDOWU PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS:
APPEAR: Adam G. Slote, Esq. 393-8001 for petitioner & moving party; Julian O. Standen, Deputy Atty General 703-5535 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: Argued and the Court ruled as follows: Petition for writ of mandate is remanded for further factual findings; to be heard by another hearing officer. Respondent to prepare order. (302/AJR/AA) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193

Osc
Off Calendar Oct-17-2002 Continued To Nov-04-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
